news.original_title: Firm solar and storage costs fall to $54/MWh, says IRENA
news.original_summary: A new report by the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA) finds that round‑the‑clock solar and wind paired with battery storage deliver power at lower cost than new fossil fuel generation in high‑quality resource regions.

news.original_title: Rivian (RIVN) mulls making its own lidar as it builds full autonomous driving stack

news.title: 比特币财务公司 Strategy 打破了“永不出售”的策略，转向旗舰加密货币
news.summary: 策略正在从被动积累比特币转向主动管理资产负债表，以提高比特币每股价值。

news.original_title: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
news.original_summary: Strategy is shifting from passive bitcoin accumulation to actively managing balance sheet to boost bitcoin per share value.

news.title: Bumble 的付费用户正在下滑，因为它押注于今年晚些时候进行彻底改革
news.summary: 该公司下了很大的赌注，认为刷卡模式已经过时，而且大多数匹配永远不会变成实际日期。该公司希望通过重新设计个人资料、改变人们互动的方式以及更多地关注吸引用户来解决这个问题

news.original_title: Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year

news.title: 染色体工程揭示了小麦抗镰刀菌的新位点
news.summary: 已在小麦中绘制了从白披碱引入的一个新的赤霉病抗性基因座。细胞遗传学和靶向分析定义了细分市场并实现了标记开发，以支持更具弹性的小麦品种的育种

news.original_title: Chromosome Engineering Reveals New Locus for Fusarium Resistance in Wheat
news.original_summary: A new Fusarium head blight resistance locus introgressed from Elymus repens has been mapped in wheat. Cytogenetic and targeted analyses defined the segment and enabled marker development to support breeding of more resilient wheat varieties

news.original_title: Super Micro stock jumps 18% on guidance beat as revenue more than doubles
